description: Cal.com is a scheduling platform and scheduling API for individuals, teams, and organizations. It lets users publish booking links, manage availability, and embed scheduling workflows into their own products.
summary: Cal.com exposes a v2 REST API at `https://api.cal.com/v2`, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.cal.com/mcp`, and an official `calcom` CLI (`@calcom/cli`); the API uses API keys, OAuth bearer tokens, and deprecated platform headers, while the hosted MCP server uses OAuth and the CLI logs in with an API key.
